- Processed personal and business checks, including handling money transfers via services such as MoneyGram.  
- Calculated and documented payroll taxes, wages, and registered reports using QuickBooks and 21st Century Accounting software.  
- Managed customer inquiries by receiving and responding to calls regarding various business-related matters and issues.
